name: Regulex

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of drawing by hand when you need to explain a JavaScript regular expression as a scalable railroad SVG, because native implementations fail on precise layout for branches, backreferences, character sets, and quantifiers.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only explain a regex in words; they cannot reliably generate SVG with branching links, character-set boxes, and quantifier loops from a regex AST. AI should not rewrite either parsing or layout.

data_in.note: Pass only the expression body in regex, without /.../ delimiters; pass flags separately to the visualizer. Regulex 0.0.5 is a legacy ECMAScript parser and is not guaranteed to accept later syntax such as Unicode property escapes.

schema.regex: string -- JavaScript RegExp source, for example the body of ^(?:foo|bar)+$
schema.flags?: string -- composed only of g, i, and m; default ''. The visual layout reads only m, while the others annotate the title

spec.note: Regulex calculates the SVG's real width and height from content; the wrapper defaults to an explicit 360px height with scrolling in both directions, which AI may override with a pixel value. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把 JavaScript 正则表达式解释成可缩放 railroad SVG 时用它而非手写,因为原生在分支、回溯引用、字符集和量词的精确布局上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能用文字解释正则,做不到从正则 AST 稳定生成带分支连线、字符集盒和量词回路的 SVG;解析与布局两层都不应由 AI 重写。

data_in.note: regex 只传表达式正文,不要带 /.../ 定界符;flags 单独传给 visualizer。Regulex 0.0.5 是 legacy ECMAScript 解析器,不保证接受后来的 Unicode property escape 等新语法。
data_in._why_no_example: 正则表达式是 AI 原生记法,schema 足以校准输入,不附 minimal example。

schema.regex: string —— JavaScript RegExp source,例如 ^(?:foo|bar)+$ 的正文
schema.flags?: string —— 仅由 g、i、m 组成,默认 ''；可视化布局实际只读取 m,其余用于标题标注

spec.note: Regulex 由内容计算 SVG 的真实宽高;外层默认显式 360px 高并双向滚动,AI 可用像素值覆盖。禁用 vh/百分比高度。

boot.note: 保守路径已按 0.0.5 README 校对:dist/regulex.js 内含 parse、visualize 与 Raphael,经其 AMD loader 的 require('regulex') 取得。不要改用包根 /+esm,该入口确实只暴露 parser。

uplink: 纯展示组件,默认无需上行;若要回传正则编辑结果,由消费 AI 自己按载体读取输入并写回调,不规定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:需允许同源 iframe、iframe 内 classic script 与 jsDelivr;iframe 挂在 shadowRoot 中以隔离 legacy require/define 全局
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox iframe 需允许 classic script CDN;无 worker/wasm/font/uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: dist/regulex.js is an almond AMD bundle that installs global require/define; Raphael draws inline SVG into the target element (no document.head style, no document.body append, and no document/window addEventListener found in the bundle). The real footprint is the legacy global require/define (+ Raphael globals), which is why the catalog isolates it inside a same-origin <iframe> nested in the shadowRoot rather than mounting bare in shadow.
